title.en: Who could England face in last 32 after qualifying for next round?
title.zh-CN: 在获得下一轮资格后，英格兰队在过去的32场比赛中可以面对谁？

summary.en: England's place in the knockout stages of the World Cup is confirmed by other results before they face Panama in their final group game on Saturday.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在世界杯淘汰赛阶段的位置得到了其他结果的确认，然后他们在周六的最后一场小组赛中面对巴拿马队。

title.en: Where does Scotland's World Cup campaign leave Clarke?
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰的世界杯竞选活动给克拉克留下了什么？

summary.en: Did Steve Clarke get the best out of his Scotland squad at the 2026 World Cup as they face group-stage exit?
summary.zh-CN: 史蒂夫·克拉克（ Steve Clarke ）在2026年世界杯上面对小组赛退出时，是否充分发挥了苏格兰队的优势？

title.en: Who are the Panama players England need to look out for?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰需要注意的巴拿马球员是谁？

summary.en: BBC Sport analyses the key players for Panama who will be aiming to cause a World Cup upset against England in their final Group L fixture.
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport分析了巴拿马的主要球员，他们的目标是在最后的L组比赛中对英格兰队造成世界杯的不满。

title.en: 'Nothing is impossible' - Cape Verde make history to set up Argentina tie
title.zh-CN: “没有什么是不可能的” -佛得角创造历史，建立阿根廷领带

summary.en: How has a group of islands with just 525,000 inhabitants made it to the knockout rounds of the World Cup?
summary.zh-CN: 一群只有52.5万居民的岛屿是如何进入世界杯淘汰赛的？

title.en: One night in Miami: The Scotsmen of the apocalypse
title.zh-CN: 迈阿密一夜：世界末日的苏格兰人

summary.en: BBC Scotland's Scott Mullen paints the scene from Miami as Scotland's World Cup hopes fade.
summary.zh-CN: 苏格兰BBC的斯科特·马伦（ Scott Mullen ）描绘了迈阿密的场景，苏格兰世界杯的希望逐渐消失。

title.en: What each team needs to reach World Cup knockouts
title.zh-CN: 每支球队进入世界杯淘汰赛所需的条件

summary.en: With the final round of group fixtures nearing a conclusion the path to the World Cup final on 19 July is starting to take shape.
summary.zh-CN: 随着最后一轮小组赛接近尾声，通往7月19日世界杯决赛的道路开始成形。

title.en: Cape Verde's incredible World Cup journey continues after Saudi draw
title.zh-CN: 在沙特抽签后，佛得角令人难以置信的世界杯之旅仍在继续

summary.en: Cape Verde deliver a valiant performance to earn their third draw of the group stage, a result that means they qualify for the last 32 in their World Cup debut while Saudi Arabia crash out.
summary.zh-CN: 佛得角队表现出色，赢得了小组赛的第三次平局，这意味着他们有资格在世界杯首场比赛中进入最后32场比赛，而沙特阿拉伯队则失利。

title.en: Muslera mistake gifts Spain win as 10-man Uruguay crash out 'in disgrace'
title.zh-CN: Muslera错误礼物西班牙获胜， 10人乌拉圭“耻辱地”崩溃

summary.en: Goalkeeper Fernando Muslera's mistake gifts Alex Baena the only goal of the game, as Spain defeat Uruguay to send Marcelo Bielsa's side out of the World Cup in the group stage.
summary.zh-CN: 守门员费尔南多·穆斯莱拉（ Fernando Muslera ）的错误让亚历克斯·巴纳（ Alex Baena ）成为比赛的唯一进球，因为西班牙击败乌拉圭，让马塞洛·别尔萨（ Marcelo Bielsa ）的球队在小组赛中退出世界杯

title.en: 'The fairytale continues!' Emotional scenes as Cape Verde qualify for last 32
title.zh-CN: “童话故事还在继续！”情感场景，佛得角有资格获得最后32场比赛

summary.en: Jubilation and tears among Cape Verde fans and players as they confirm their 'miracle' qualification for the last 32 of the World Cup after earning a point against Saudi Arabia in Houston.
summary.zh-CN: 在休斯顿对阵沙特阿拉伯的比赛中，佛得角球迷和球员们获得了积分，确认了他们在世界杯最后32场比赛中的“奇迹”资格。

title.en: 'I leave nothing' - the end of 'toxic' Bielsa's Uruguay reign
title.zh-CN: “我什么都不留下” - “有毒” Bielsa的乌拉圭统治的终结

summary.en: With Uruguay eliminated from the 2026 World Cup, BBC Sport looks at what has gone wrong for them under colourful coach Marcelo Bielsa.
summary.zh-CN: 随着乌拉圭被淘汰出2026年世界杯， BBC体育台在色彩缤纷的教练马塞洛·别尔萨（ Marcelo Bielsa ）的带领下审视了他们出了什么问题。

title.en: Why England should be wary of Panama's hybrid tactics
title.zh-CN: 为什么英格兰应该警惕巴拿马的混合战术

summary.en: Panama's results do not paint a true picture of their performances in the World Cup so far - so what can England expect from them?
summary.zh-CN: 巴拿马的结果并没有描绘出他们迄今为止在世界杯上的表现的真实情况-那么英格兰对他们有什么期望呢？

title.en: From supermarket to World Cup - the forgotten England team
title.zh-CN: 从超市到世界杯：被遗忘的英格兰队

summary.en: New Ferens Park feels a world away from the New York New Jersey Stadium, but it was on this artificial pitch in the north east of England where a future member of Thomas Tuchel's World Cup squad got...
summary.zh-CN: 新费伦斯公园（ New Ferens Park ）与纽约新泽西体育场（ New York New Jersey Stadium ）相距甚远，但正是在英格兰东北部的这个人工球场上，托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）世界杯球队的未来成员获得了......

title.en: Spain's Pino may miss rest of World Cup
title.zh-CN: 西班牙的皮诺可能会错过世界杯的其余部分

summary.en: Spain winger Yeremy Pino may miss the rest of the World Cup with a suspected broken collarbone.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙边锋Yeremy Pino可能会怀疑锁骨骨折而错过世界杯的其余部分。

title.en: Group L finale as England take on Panama with Croatia vs Ghana LIVE!
title.zh-CN: L组决赛，英格兰队对阵巴拿马队，克罗地亚队对阵加纳队，现场直播！

title.en: 0.07%! Scotland on brink of exit - can Ghana give them lifeline?
title.zh-CN: 0.07% ！苏格兰处于退出的边缘--加纳能给他们生命线吗？

summary.en: Scotland need a miracle to stay in the World Cup ahead of the final group-stage matches on Saturday.
summary.zh-CN: 在周六的最后一场小组赛之前，苏格兰需要一个奇迹才能留在世界杯。
